name: jsexpect
description: A small Expect-like automation library and CLI for Node.js, built on a real pseudo-terminal.

scripts.check: node --check src/index.js && node --check bin/jsexpect.js && node --check examples/ssh-login.js && node --check examples/shell-demo.js && node --check examples/telehack.js && node --check examples/mock-login-terminal.js && node --check examples/mock-login-expect.js && node --check examples/multi-host-support.js && node --check examples/ephemeral-session-terminal.js && node --check examples/ephemeral-reconnect-support.js && node --check test/smoke.js
